title: loq
description: modpack with QOL and optimisation features.
body:
modpack with QOL and optimisation features for Fabric.

_note: custom configurations to some mods_
* Disable low armour durability SFX in 'uku's armor HUD'
* Enable Always On Shulker box preview in 'Shulker Box Tooltip'
* Libraries Not Counted in 'Mod Menu'
* Brightness boost set to 15 in 'Bactromod'
  
Client-side only. Requires Fabric Loader and Java 21+ (obviously).

Available versions: [1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/modpack/loq/version/1.21.11+1.15)
